class.name: network_bridge::UdpInterface
class.description: A UDP network interface for the network bridge.

class.name: network_bridge::TcpInterface
class.description: A TCP network interface for the network bridge.

class.name: network_bridge::IoUringInterface
class.description: A Linux io_uring UDP network interface (Extension E). Built only when liburing is available; registered buffers + batched sendmsg/recvmsg as an alternative to the Boost.Asio UDP backend.
